mano_cua.result_summary: Custom Functions控制台日志过滤功能无法测试。Custom Functions页面仅显示信息提示，编辑器Run按钮跳转localhost:3200（runner未启动，ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED）。控制台过滤功能在runner中实现，当前环境仅启动editor(:3000)。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: I can now clearly see the Custom Functions page at https://localhost:3000/#/custom-functions. Content: Script Lab logo + "Custom Functions" title + informational message + link to instructions. No interactive elements (no editor, no runner, no console panel). This is the definitive Custom Functions page in this application. There is NO console log filtering feature accessible.
